generic.en: I'd be okay eating his soul, I think.
What to choose, what to choose...
This magic makes my brain so soft and floaty!
generic.trans: 这魔法让我脑袋轻飘飘的！

nolight.en: A deep, dark hole that knows no end!

generic.en: I bet the mortals would like some of that.
generic.trans: 我打赌凡人们喜欢那个。

normal.en: It burns the right amount, I'd say.

high.en: It burns so bright both day and night.

hammered.en: It lost its glamor to the hammer.

generic.en: A cage to hold the dragon's rage.

healingsalve.en: To remove the pain of this weary world!
healingsalve.trans: 为这个萎靡的世界缓解疼痛！

marbletree.en: And here we see... a marble tree!

quagmire_park_fountain.en: How disappointing, it's all dried up.

waterplant_planter.trans: 一个蹦蹦跳跳的小灯泡。

cave_fern.trans: 黑暗的环境非常适合它。

carnivaldecor_eggride.en: On and on and on it goes!

mutator_healer.en: A tasty treat for those tiny terrors!

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: We're almost ready for the fun to begin!
carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.trans: 我们几乎已经准备好了，可以开始玩了！

healingsalve_acid.en: It'll heal, seal, even congeal! Get Slimy Salve today! What a steal!
healingsalve_acid.trans:
它能愈合、密封、甚至凝结！
今天就下单购买黏糊药膏吧！真是浪费！

shadow_beef_bell.en: A bell to bring back the beef!
shadow_beef_bell.trans: 可以把牛肉带回来的铃铛！

eel_cooked.en: I'd rather not put that in my flesh body.
eel_cooked.trans: 我不想把这玩意放到我的肉体里。

record_danger.en: Oh dear, what have we here?

boaron.en: Who invited a pig to this shindig?

generic.en: Her hooks are bare, but should I care?
generic.trans: 晾肉架空空如也，帮她也未尝不可？

burnt.en: A silly prank to be sure.
burnt.trans: 绝对是个愚蠢的恶作剧。

beehat.en: What if my horns get stung?

handpillow_steelwool.en: A nasty thing, it'll do well in the ring!
handpillow_steelwool.trans: 此物刺骨，擂台上能显威武！

lunarfrog.en: Ever seen such a sight as a hopping night light?
lunarfrog.trans: 就问谁见过跳西跳东的夜灯？

gunpowder.en: I'll spell your doom with a mighty BOOM!

winter_ornamentgorge.en: Adornment from the land of goats!

yotp_food1.en: I'll take a little tiny nibble.

yotp_food2.en: I'll try it, if you insist.
yotp_food2.trans: 如果你坚持的话，我就试试。

nonslipgrit.trans: 我怎么蹦蹦跳跳都不会滑倒！

chesspiece_crabking.en: He was better at sinking than being a sea king.
chesspiece_crabking.trans: 虽然是海中霸主，但他会沉的很快。

kitcoon_yot.en: Oh what a date, let's celebrate!

warg.en: I'll not be a feast for that beast!
warg.trans: 我不会成为那只野兽的大餐。

quagmire_coin2.en: The Gnaw expelled it from its craw.

monkeyqueen.trans: 用她的王国换一个秋千！

quagmire_coin3.en: The Gnaw has spoken. We've earned its token.
quagmire_coin3.trans: 饕餮发话了。我们赚到了它的硬币。

brokenhorn_follower.en: I'm afraid I don't have any spare horns.
brokenhorn_follower.trans: 我也没有多余的角给你。

follower.en: Come along, there's a sea full of mischief to be had!
follower.trans: 来吧，我们的征途是恶作剧的大海！

brokenhorn.en: I don't see your point, hyuyu!

generic.en: Now now, no need to put a dent in my dinghy.
generic.trans: 有话好好说，没必要把我的小舢板扎出洞来。

unwritten.en: Nothing to be seen here, I fear.
unwritten.trans: 恐怕这里没什么好看的。

burnt.en: A silly prank to be sure.
burnt.trans: 绝对是个愚蠢的恶作剧。

generic.en: It really doesn't matter which way I go!

construction_plans.en: But it's more fun to wing it!
construction_plans.trans: 与其按图索骥，不如随心所欲！

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: A bit of this, a bit of that, all to train my dear Carrat!
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 这一点，那一点，把亲爱的胡萝卜鼠练的好一点！

steeringwheel.en: A big wheel to guide a keel.

turf_road.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_road.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

mast_item.en: A mast to sail the ocean vast.

book_birds.en: Humans share their knowledge so freely.
book_birds.trans: 人类如此自由的分享着知识。

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: To win the race, I need a Carrat that can keep up the pace!
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 要赢得竞赛，胡萝卜鼠要跑的够快！

lureplant.en: As the spider catches the fly.

polishcookie.en: You can't prank a prankster, hyuyu!
polishcookie.trans: 你骗不了恶作剧大师，哼！

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: Never underestimate the power of a strong quill.
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 永远不要低估羽毛的强大力量。

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: You can always count on the mortals to make things needlessly complicated.
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 凡人们一准会把事情搞得无谓地复杂。

mask_mirrorhat.en: A mask to place upon my face.
mask_mirrorhat.trans: 脸上戴着面具，自有一番心绪。

turf_mosaic_blue.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_mosaic_blue.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

footballhat.en: I hope I don't get helmet horns.
footballhat.trans: 希望别给我长角的帽子。

support_pillar_scaffold.trans: 一堆正在修建中的柱子。

has_item_light.en: It's not enough to tip the scale, hyuyu!

generic.en: Hoohoo, a game!

teleportato_crank.en: It's a thing. For the thing!

tillweedsalve.en: A welcome break from pains and aches.
tillweedsalve.trans: 对痛苦和创伤的一点点慰藉。

archive_orchestrina_main.en: This floor is soundly built, hyuyu!

hermitcrabtea_petals.en: When I start losing my grip, I'll have a little sip!
hermitcrabtea_petals.trans: 每当快要撑不住，拿起茶杯咕嘟嘟。

watertree_pillar.en: It seems we've found safe arbor, hyuyu!
watertree_pillar.trans: 看来我们已经找到了避风桩，哼！

picked.en: The mortals picked it with such glee.

generic.en: And so it grows from out the sea.

shovel.en: I could dig a hole where I belong!
shovel.trans: 想在哪挖洞，就在哪挖洞！

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.en: Ooo, what delightful games we might play in there!
multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 哦，我们也许能在里面好好玩一下！

chesspiece_manrabbit.en: Looking at it fills me with hoppiness, hyuyu!

trailmix.trans: 看着挺有嚼头。我讨厌咀嚼。

pomegranate_oversized.en: How in the underworld did you grow so big?

woodcarvedhat.en: Perhaps I can borrow it, if I axe nicely.
woodcarvedhat.trans: 如果我砍得好的话，也许我可以借用它。

houndstooth_blowpipe.trans: 带牙吹箭，吹到你满地找牙。

brush.trans: 用来梳理我有型的胸毛。

spoiled_food.en: Oh jeez, oh yuck, a pile of muck.

sentryward.en: Hyuyu! What a mischievous way to spy!
sentryward.trans: 哼！这种侦查的方式真调皮！

short.en: Oh dear, oh dear, it's almost here!

generic.en: They grow up so fast, or so I hear.

long.en: It isn't ready to come out and play.
long.trans: 它还没准备好，暂时不能出来跟我们玩。

generic.en: It's dead but not done.

critter_puppy.en: Sorry I can't pet you, little friend.
critter_puppy.trans: 抱歉我不能收你做宠物，亲爱的小朋友。

sleep.en: It's sure to entertain our guests!
sleep.trans: 肯定能娱乐我们的客人。

generic.en: It's sure to entertain our guests!
generic.trans: 肯定能娱乐我们的客人。

moonrocknugget.en: It was hewn from solid moon.

skeleton_notplayer.en: Love to stay and chew the fat, but you seem lacking of that.
skeleton_notplayer.trans: 我愿留下吃肉，可你们身上已没有。

boat_bumper_shell.en: We shell be well protected, hyuyu!
boat_bumper_shell.trans: 贝壳提供的保护应该很合格，哼哼！

quagmire_salt.en: Mortals tongues seem to like it.
quagmire_salt.trans: 凡人的舌头好像喜欢它。

chesspiece_moon.en: The mortals thought it was made of cheese! Hyuyu!
chesspiece_moon.trans: 凡人们误以为它是奶酪做的！哼哼！

farm_plow.en: Plowing a plot for picky plants.

quagmire_onion_cooked.en: Cooked, but not into a dish.
quagmire_onion_cooked.trans: 已烹饪，但是没做成一道菜。

birchnutdrake.trans: 微小的森林之子，充满仇恨！

walking_stick.en: A walking stick for walking quick.

furtuft.trans: 不是从我胸膛上拔下来的！

polly_rogers.en: What spell compels her to help?
polly_rogers.trans: 是什么咒语迫使她伸出援爪？

construction1.en: I'll help a bit, but if it's no fun I'll quit!
construction1.trans: 我可以先帮一下忙，但没意思的话，我就退出了！

generic.en: Hyuyuyu, I don't think they'll like that...
generic.trans: 哼哼，他们应该不喜欢那样……

chesspiece_beequeen.trans: 一动不动的皇亲国戚。静止的昆虫。

idle.en: We've finished the deed, nowhere left to lead.

generic.en: There's something hidden that it seeks.
generic.trans: 它寻找的是隐藏的东西。

batnosehat.en: What will the mortals cook up next.
batnosehat.trans: 这些凡人还要烹饪什么。

trident.en: Holding a pitchfork feels disturbingly natural.
trident.trans: 没想到这个音叉握起来这么自然。

pumpkincookie.en: Real food is a bit hard on my stomach.
pumpkincookie.trans: 真正的食物让我有点消化不良。

walkingplank_ancient.en: It's just a last resort, worrywart!
walkingplank_ancient.trans: 只是最后一招，不要自寻烦恼。

moonrockcrater.en: It might be an eye, were gems in supply.
moonrockcrater.trans: 可能是只眼睛，里面还有宝石。

malbatross.en: It's bad luck to shoot it down, but what do I know? Hyuyu!
malbatross.trans: 打它下来可能会招致厄运，但我又知道什么呢？哼！

burning.en: Cleansing fire, so the worst won't transpire.
burning.trans: 一把涤魂火，灾祸全戳破。

generic.en: I'm not mistaken, its life's been taken.
generic.trans: 我没看走眼，它已玩儿完。

gingerbreadhouse.trans: 多么有魅力的饼干农舍啊。

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: Hyuyu, no talking with your mouth full!
barnaclestuffedfishhead.trans: 哼，嘴巴里有东西时不要讲话！

turf_beard_rug.en: What a hairy situation this is!

merm_toolshed.en: Does appear we're not welcome here.

shadow_forge_kit.en: All work and no play makes for an irritable imp.
shadow_forge_kit.trans: 只工作，不玩耍，小小恶魔脾气炸。

generic.en: Hyuyu, moon secrets are so fun!

moon_altar_wip.en: Hyuyu, you'll owe me one after this!
moon_altar_wip.trans: 哼，帮了你可就欠我人情了！

unhappy.en: Apologies, dear beast! I am but a worm!
unhappy.trans: 抱歉，亲爱的野兽！我只是一只虫子！

veryhappy.en: Are you not pleased, my friend?

generic.en: You need only tell me what you desire.
generic.trans: 你只需要告诉我你想要什么。

monkeypillar.en: Are these the pillars of monkey society?
monkeypillar.trans: 这些是猴子社会的支柱吗？

cactus_meat_cooked.en: The prickles are gone, but I still don't want to eat it.
cactus_meat_cooked.trans: 虽然没刺了，但是我还是不想吃。

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: A puzzling piece of a pattern.

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: A puzzling piece of a pattern.

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: Gives me a lot of extra bite!

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: A puzzling piece of a pattern.

wx78_moduleremover.en: It'll work in a pinch, hyuyu!
wx78_moduleremover.trans: 这是专门用来掐机器人的，哼哼！

weed_ivy.en: It seems a little wound up.

goldenpickaxe.en: The mortals say you have to spend gold to make gold.
goldenpickaxe.trans: 凡人们说得用黄金才能制作出黄金。

inactive.en: It wants to see me lose my marbles!
inactive.trans: 它想让我弄丢我的弹珠！

quagmire_seedpacket.en: Plant them in a plot of land.

handpillow_kelp.en: I'd never wish to sleep like a fish.
handpillow_kelp.trans: 就算眼皮下垂，也不像鱼一样睡。

ruinshat.en: Jewelry to emphasize my fantastic horns!
ruinshat.trans: 珠宝可以突出我美丽的角！

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: A bit of this, a bit of that, all to train my dear Carrat!
yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.trans: 这一点，那一点，把亲爱的胡萝卜鼠练的好一点！

bloom.trans: 恶心的同时又令人愉悦！

generic.en: A massive mushroom! Did I quaff a shrinking potion?
generic.trans: 好大的蘑菇！我是喝了缩小药水了吗？

broken.en: What a joke! The switch is broke!
broken.trans: 好一个笑话！这开关已完蛋！

generic.en: That light's alright!

spear_lance.en: Live in fear of the spear!
spear_lance.trans: 活在威武长矛的恐惧中吧！

twigs.en: Little twigs that bend and snap!

nightlight.trans: 上天啊，多么优雅的装饰！

corn_seeds.en: Grow a seed and you shall feed!
corn_seeds.trans: 春种一粒粟，秋收万颗子！

yotb.en: Our judge just may have something to say.
yotb.trans: 我们的评委也许想说两句。

generic.en: Enjoying the plush life? Hyuyuyu!
generic.trans: 喜欢填的满满的生活吗？哼！

cactus_meat.en: I don't want to eat anything prickly.

deck_of_cards.en: One sec, who shuffled this deck?

moonrock_pieces.en: Smashable, crashable fun to be had.
moonrock_pieces.trans: 把这些砸烂，敲碎应该很好玩。

featherhat.en: Feathers and horns go well together.
featherhat.trans: 羽毛和我的角十分搭配。

atrium_key.en: An imp could do mischievous things with this.
atrium_key.trans: 有了这个就可以恶作剧了。

pocketwatch_dismantler.en: The tools of a time tinkerer.

balloonvest.en: A bright balloon vest to wear across my chest.
balloonvest.trans: 气球背心真鲜艳，优雅地穿在胸前。

line_1.en: A bunch of mortals. They look very bored.
line_1.trans: 一群凡夫俗子。看着无所事事。

line_2.en: There's some magic residue on the stone. Not much else.
line_2.trans: 石头上残留了些魔法，除此之外，别无他物。

line_5.en: They probably shouldn't have used that much magic.
line_5.trans: 本不该施这么多魔法的。

line_3.en: Ooo, it's about to get good!

line_4.en: What a hoot! The mortals are slithering out their skins!
line_4.trans: 真好笑！凡人们像蛇一样蜕皮！

charging.en: Oh, we're going to have some fun!

on.en: That's how you get imps. Hyuyu!

abandoned.en: A shame it all ends the same.
abandoned.trans: 可惜，一切终将归于死寂。

generic.en: How can I feel low with such a pretty glow?
generic.trans: 光芒之美，让心情随之放飞！

burning.en: Oh I say, it'll burn away!

generic.en: A piece of what was once a tree.
That's a bird, or so I've heard.

trails.en: You wouldn't pummel a tiny imp, would you?!

spider_repellent.en: The easiest way to get rid of a spider is with a big shoo, hyuyu!
spider_repellent.trans: 摆脱蜘蛛的最简单的方法是猛吹哨子，哼！

carnival_vest_b.en: A cloak of leaves to drape around my impish frame.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 叶子斗篷披身上，这个恶魔会扮靓。

waxpaper.trans: 小小的腊纸，可以用来包装。

merm_lunar.en: It rose from the dirt. I wonder if those spikes hurt.
merm_lunar.trans: 它从泥土中坐起。那些尖刺是否锋利？

emberlight.en: Aren't you a bit big for a will-o'-the-wisp?
emberlight.trans: 你的个头是不是大了一点？

growing.trans: 噢美好的一天。盐又多了。

mined_out.en: Heehee, hoho, it had to go.

generic.en: Interesting.

book_bees.en: I think I'll beekeeping my distance, hyuyu!
book_bees.trans: 从养蜂中汲取养分，哼哼！

burning.en: Twiddle dee dee, a burning tree!
burning.trans: 噼里啪啦，一棵烧着的树！

generic.en: A mournful tree full of lumps and bumps.
generic.trans: 悲恸的大树长满了肿块和疙瘩。

generic.en: Whoa, uncanny beefalo!
generic.trans: 哇，好一头不可思议的皮弗娄牛！

gazpacho.en: This human food stuff seems more watery than usual.
gazpacho.trans: 这种人类的食物含水量异常的高。

turf_monkey_ground.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_monkey_ground.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

turf_mud.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_mud.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

archive_lockbox.en: Oh ho! A puzzling piece indeed!
archive_lockbox.trans: 哦吼！真个一块令人费解的东西！

carnival_vest_a.en: I'm quite partial to the style.
carnival_vest_a.trans: 我对这种风格相当偏爱。

firestarter.en: What a marvelously mischievous monkey.

ghost.en: I wonder if monkey souls are banana-flavored?
ghost.trans: 猴子的鬼魂是不是香蕉味的？

murderer.en: Now now, I think chimps and imps should get along!
murderer.trans: 咋回事，小恶魔跟猩猩按道理应该和平相处啊！

attacker.en: It looks like the curse has brought out your worst.
attacker.trans: 看来诅咒让你最坏的一面显现了出来。

reviver.en: The day is saved, with the ape's aid.
reviver.trans: 多得猴哥帮忙，我才没有凉凉。

generic.en: Hyuyuyu, someone's gotten themselves in a hairy situation!

wx78module_maxhealth.en: Are you the brightest bulb of the bunch?
wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 你是夜空中最闪亮的灯泡么？

generic.en: My oh my, you look ill! Low of spirit, green 'round the gill.
generic.trans: 我的天，你看着生病了！没什么精神，病恹恹的。

sleeping.en: Sleeping like the fishes. Hyuyu!

turf_ruinstiles.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_ruinstiles.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

wagstaff_mutations_note.en: The writings of a visionary, or the ravings of a madman? Who's to say!
wagstaff_mutations_note.trans: 是先知的著作，还是疯子的呓语？谁能说得清！

mask_queenhat.en: A mask to place upon my face.
mask_queenhat.trans: 脸上戴着面具，自有一番心绪。

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: I miss the wriggle, it made me giggle.
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 想念它扭麻花，逗得我笑哈哈。

yotb_post_item.en: Let's get it done so we can have fun!
yotb_post_item.trans: 赶紧弄完，我们好一起玩！

book_brimstone.en: Who would leave such precious knowledge lying here?
book_brimstone.trans: 这么宝贵的知识，是谁丢在这的？

slurtle_shellpieces.en: Shards of shell I do see here.

glassed.en: They certainly are keeping a watchful eye over us, hyuyu!
glassed.trans: 它们很明显在用眼睛盯着我们，哼哼。

cave.en: It was so silly to build it down here!

night_full.en: Hyuyu, I feel a bit loony!

night_wax.en: It's waxing, yes oh yes it is.

night_wane.en: It's on the wane, oh yes indeed.

generic.en: What a handsome devil I see in the water!

archive_security_pulse.en: A fellow fae come to show me the way? I think not, hyuyu!
archive_security_pulse.trans: 一个仙女来给我指路了？应该不会的，哼！

generic.en: Grind, grind, grind away.

tomato_oversized.en: Hyuyu, I'll have to find something very big to throw it at!
tomato_oversized.trans: 哼，它这么大，我得找个大的目标把它丢出去！

thulecite.en: I'll use the nearest shrine to produce a design.
thulecite.trans: 我要用最近的神社来做一个设计。

quagmire_altar_ivy.trans: 阴森的常春藤，越长越壮。

quagmire_rubble_carriage.en: Which squeaky wheel will get the grease?
quagmire_rubble_carriage.trans: 哪个吱吱响的轮子能上到油？

burning.en: Shh, shush! I see ahead a burning bush!
burning.trans: 嘘，嘘！我看到前面的灌木着火了！

generic.en: Yikes! Spikes.

quagmire_grill_small.trans: 凡人们用它来煮东西的。

generic.en: Shiny and sharp.

dug_sapling.en: Put it back in the dirt, before it gets hurt!
dug_sapling.trans: 赶紧栽回土里，不然小草要受伤了！

burnt.en: Burnt down, down to the ground.

generic.en: I could catch a wink, I think.

boat_grass_item.en: This grass will pass for a boat, hyuyu!
boat_grass_item.trans: 姑且就以草当船吧，哼哼！

moonglassaxe.en: Swing and a chop, all the trees drop!

bodypillow_petals.en: Armor doesn't often smell so nice!

pocket_scale.en: Allow me to quickly weigh in, hyuyu!

feather_robin_winter.en: A keepsake of a gentle blue friend.
feather_robin_winter.trans: 一位温柔的蓝色朋友留下的纪念。

moon_cap_cooked.en: Why you tricky thing, you've changed!
moon_cap_cooked.trans: 你这个狡猾的家伙，你变了！

mermarmorupgradedhat.en: It will find its home on a merm's fishy dome.
mermarmorupgradedhat.trans: 它会在鱼人的圆脑袋上找到自己的家。

quagmire_potato_cooked.en: Cooked, but not into a dish.
quagmire_potato_cooked.trans: 已烹饪，但是没做成一道菜。

dreadstone_stack.en: Who knows where it grows from?
dreadstone_stack.trans: 谁知道它是从哪里长出来的？

klaus_sack.trans: 里面有什么好吃的东西？

milkywhites.en: This loot from our fight does not bring delight.
milkywhites.trans: 这个战利品没有特色，不会带来快乐。

picked.en: Her baby is gone. That's just wrong.
picked.trans: 她的宝宝不见了。那种行为是错误的。

generic.en: A pretty egg in mother's nest.
generic.trans: 一颗在母亲巢里的漂亮的蛋。

eyemaskhat.en: Well, isn't this a sight for sore eyes. Hyuyuyu!
eyemaskhat.trans: 嗯，乱花渐欲迷人眼啊。哼！

wx78module_bee.en: Are you the brightest bulb of the bunch?
wx78module_bee.trans: 你是夜空中最闪亮的灯泡么？

wall_wood_item.en: It's of no use there on the ground.
wall_wood_item.trans: 单单这个放在地上没用。

turf_fungus.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_fungus.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

generic.en: None can impede this imp!

rock_petrified_tree_old.trans: 哟！一棵石头般冰冷的树！

generic.en: An old, dead tree, beached and bleached.
generic.trans: 一颗老死的树，被水漂的苍白。

burnt.en: So much tinder, burnt to cinder.

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: A mask to place upon my face.
mask_dollbrokenhat.trans: 脸上戴着面具，自有一番心绪。

yots_worm.en: Stand firm against the squirm of the worm!

desiccantboosted.en: A real champ against the damp!

honeynuggets.en: I guess they do look kind of good.
honeynuggets.trans: 好吧，他们确实挺好看的。

staff_lunarplant.en: With a flick of the wrist, someone's getting hit.
staff_lunarplant.trans: 抖抖手腕有人就要挨打。

messagebottle.en: I'm tempted to take a peek!

ghost.en: Just a nibble? You don't need all that soul.
ghost.trans: 就吃一小口好么？你要那么多灵魂也没用。

firestarter.en: Ooo, what funny pranks you play!
firestarter.trans: 哦，你玩的恶作剧真有意思！

murderer.en: Eep! I'm but a helpless imp!
murderer.trans: 啊！我就是一只无助的小恶魔！

attacker.en: Hyuyu, I think I pushed her buttons!

reviver.en: %s, you generous soul!

generic.en: Do you think me too silly, %s?

charlie_npc.en: The Shadow Queen is finally seen!

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: A bit of this, a bit of that, all to train my dear Carrat!
yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.trans: 这一点，那一点，把亲爱的胡萝卜鼠练的好一点！

pomegranate.en: You need only eat one seed. Hyuyu!

fossil_piece.en: A little piece of a great big beast.
fossil_piece.trans: 巨兽留下的一块小化石。

follower.en: Hyuyu! Are we playing follow the leader?
follower.trans: 哼！我们是在玩跟随领袖的游戏么？

guard.en: You wouldn't hit an imp, would you?!

generic.en: Would you like to see a trick?

off.en: When it's out I feel great dread.
off.trans: 熄灭后，我感到深深的恐惧。

on.en: I quite like it when it's red!
on.trans: 它变红以后非常惹人爱！

ready.en: Let's hop, skip and jump out of here!
ready.trans: 我们蹦蹦跳跳的离开这里吧！

unlocked.en: Ooo, my fur's standing on end in anticipation!
unlocked.trans: 唔，我期待的毛发都立起来了。

generic.en: How very, very curious!

shroombait.en: As sure as the oozing, this'll have you snoozing.
shroombait.trans: 渗出的脏水将助你安睡。

scrap_monoclehat.en: My my, that distant look in your eye!

wilted.en: Tiny flower on the table... you aren't looking very stable.
wilted.trans: 桌上的小花啊，你看着不太稳。

freshlight.en: A light so bright I might still see at night!
freshlight.trans: 灯光璀璨耀眼，夜晚都能看到！

oldlight.en: I'll try not to pout when that light soon goes out.
oldlight.trans: 灯光估计一会就熄灭了，我到时尽量不噘嘴吧。

generic.en: I never learned my table manners.
generic.trans: 我就从来没学会过餐桌礼仪。

empty.en: Now now, let's set the table.
empty.trans: 来来，咱们把桌子布置好。

supertacklecontainer.en: That's quite a lot to tackle, hyuyu!

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: But idle hands are such good playthings!

beargerfur_sack.en: Is that where the mortals pack food away for the winter?
beargerfur_sack.trans: 凡人就是用这个保存食物过冬吗？

papyrus.en: An ancient scroll in the making.

lavae_tooth.en: My mom still has mine somewhere.
lavae_tooth.trans: 我妈妈把我换下的牙保存起来了。

gestalt_guard_evolved.en: Well whad'ya know, we reap what we sow!

spicepack.en: What a cute little pack. Hyuyu!

fused_shadeling_bomb.en: Keep away, I don't want to play!

mask_kinghat.en: A mask to place upon my face.
mask_kinghat.trans: 脸上戴着面具，自有一番心绪。

dug_trap_starfish.en: Planting this would be a devilish trick.

comfy.en: Sweet and cozy as a clam.

cold.en: My oh my, you're much too cold!

quagmire_tomato_cooked.en: Cooked, but not into a dish.
quagmire_tomato_cooked.trans: 已烹饪，但是没做成一道菜。

batwing_cooked.en: Perhaps I'll find a hungry mortal to give it to.
batwing_cooked.trans: 兴许能碰着个饿了的凡人以后送给他。

generic.en: With this gift, I'll be more swift!
generic.trans: 有了这份礼物，我会加快脚步！

some_kelp.en: Would it be such a chore to add some more?

generic.en: A saddening scarcity of seaweed, I see.
generic.trans: 海藻的短缺令人痛心，我明白了。

lavae_cocoon.en: A friend is sleeping deep within.

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: A bush out of dirt is like a fish out of water.
dug_berrybush_juicy.trans: 离了土的灌木就像离了水的鱼。

generic.en: Grass that grows from richest earth.
generic.trans: 从最肥沃的土地里长出的青草。

barren.trans: 土地盐碱化，什么也长不出了。

carnival_plaza_kit.en: Now if I were a crow, where would I think it should go?
carnival_plaza_kit.trans: 如果我是一只乌鸦，我会把它放在哪？

wurt_swampitem_lunar.en: Don't be fooled by its shine so bright, what rains down is sure to fright.
wurt_swampitem_lunar.trans: 它晒得有多明亮，你待会儿就有多恐慌。

dead.en: Dead as dead as dead could be!

generic.en: Hyuyu! What a horrible face you have!

sleeping.en: Its mind has fled far from here, hyuyu.
sleeping.trans: 它的思想已经远离了这里，哼。

generic.en: A watering can, what an excellent plan!

empty.en: The water was spilled, it must be refilled!

gems.en: It could use some shine, if you ask me.

generic.en: For peace of mind.

head.en: Two heads? What about a butt?

flipped.en: A heck of a train wreck!

body.en: Hard to make a dent in that segment!
body.trans: 那一截硬得很，凹痕难留半分！

monkey_smallhat.en: When at sea, do as the monkeys do, hyuyu!
monkey_smallhat.trans: 身在海上，就跟猴子有样学样，哼哼！

boat_leak.en: Things look bleak - we have a leak!

wormhole_limited.en: I think its throat is getting sore.

mutator_dropper.en: A tasty treat for those tiny terrors!

dustmothden.en: I'm afraid their nest has something I wish to possess.
dustmothden.trans: 他们的巢穴里有我想占有的东西。

eggplant_seeds.en: Let's give them some soil, before they spoil.
eggplant_seeds.trans: 赶紧埋土里种起来，不然坏了怎么办。

vegstinger.en: I can't decide if it's for sipping or souping.
vegstinger.trans: 我也分不清这是鸡尾酒还是汤。

penguin.en: A bird that flies within the sea.

burning.en: This hot dog needs a bun.

reviving.en: Death doesn't stick? Must be a new trick.
reviving.trans: 死都死不踏实？必然是新把戏。

generic.en: A mutt in a permanent rut, hyuyu!

quagmire_swampig_house_rubble.en: Nothing but bits and bobs left.
quagmire_swampig_house_rubble.trans: 只剩下些零七八碎的东西。

quagmire_rubble_bike.en: Cycles spinning round and round. Bicycles double the spinning!
quagmire_rubble_bike.trans: 转圈圈。自行车有两个轮子转圈圈！

lichen.trans: 不到万不得已绝对不吃这种地下食物。

kitcoon_forest.en: They could prank, hide around, and never be found!
kitcoon_forest.trans: 它们玩恶作剧，捉迷藏，都是好景一场！

book_tentacles.en: Imps don't disseminate precious knowledge so carelessly.

burnt.en: Is it in fashion to look so ashen?

generic.en: Not one for chatter, I gather?
Hyuyu. Mortals don't know magic.

diseased.en: I can see the disease creeping into your soul.
diseased.trans: 我能看到疾病正在侵蚀你的灵魂。

generic.en: Hello dear friend! No need to drop your tail.
generic.trans: 你好亲爱的朋友！尾巴多好，干嘛丢掉呢。

generic.en: What if I'm actually inside out, and it's rightside in?

sleeping.en: Its mind has fled far from here, hyuyu.
sleeping.trans: 它的思想已经远离了这里，哼。

turf_fungus_moon.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_fungus_moon.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

shieldofterror.en: I stole the grin right off of him, hyuyu!
shieldofterror.trans: 我把他的笑脸偷走了，哼！

turf_checkerfloor.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_checkerfloor.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

wx78module_cold.en: Are you the brightest bulb of the bunch?
wx78module_cold.trans: 你是夜空中最闪亮的灯泡么？

yellowstaff.en: It calls the sun from out the sky!
yellowstaff.trans: 能把太阳从天空里叫出来。

stash_map.en: This map has the clues I need, now where does it lead?
stash_map.trans: 这张地图有我需要的线索，能否找到好的结果？

line_1.en: Oh, what's this? A bit of light reading?
line_1.trans: 哦，这是什么？休闲读物么？

line_2.en: It seems they were quite enamoured with our fickle moon once.
line_2.trans: 看来他们曾经很迷恋我们那变幻莫测的月亮。

line_5.en: Hyuyu, I shouldn't spoil the surprise!

line_3.en: Now this one doesn't make much sense at all. Unless...
line_3.trans: 单独看它没有什么特殊含义。除非……

meat_dried.en: Mortals like this more than when it's wet.

pig_coin.en: A punchy pig for me? Yes please!
pig_coin.trans: 送我的揍人猪？恭敬不如从命！

fishingnet.en: A riddle! What might one cast that's not a spell?
fishingnet.trans: 猜谜！除了花，还有什么可以撒？

generic.en: Hyuyu, I know a trickster when I see one!
generic.trans: 哼，我一眼就看出你也是恶作剧的同道中人！

empty.en: What is it you need? Perhaps carrots and seeds?
empty.trans: 你需要什么？胡萝卜和种子吗？

eyebrellahat.en: A cyclops' sight stretched mighty thin.

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 玩耍时间就快结束了，哼！

generic.en: Where all the furry mortals go.
generic.trans: 毛茸茸的凡间动物待的地方。

oceanfishableflotsam.en: I will shape it into a delicious mud pie! Hyuyu.
oceanfishableflotsam.trans: 我要把它捏成一个美味的泥饼！哼。

knight_nightmare.en: Eep! Play nice with the imp!

bunnystew.en: Are mortals attracted to this smell?
bunnystew.trans: 凡人是否被这种气味所吸引？

carnival_crowkid.en: Hyuyu, so nice to see these fine folk out and about!
carnival_crowkid.trans: 哼，这些家伙们跑来跑去，看着就很高兴！

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: To make a toy is such a joy!

oceantreenut.en: The sea is a nutty place to plant a tree.

turf_ruinstrim.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_ruinstrim.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

moonbutterflywings.en: Gossamer wings of pale, pale green.
moonbutterflywings.trans: 灰绿色的蝉翼，蛛网般轻薄。

quagmire_onion.en: You'll see no tears from my eye. I cannot cry!
quagmire_onion.trans: 你不会看到我眼中的泪水。我天生不哭！

generic.en: What delightful surprises are you hoarding?
generic.trans: 你藏了哪些令人愉快的惊喜？

burnt.en: Someone went and started the fun without me!
burnt.trans: 有人在我不在的时候就开始玩了！

empty.en: Rumble and grumble, it wants charcoal!

dead.en: Send my regards to your master!

generic.en: We got off to a rocky start, didn't we? Hyuyu!
generic.trans: 我们开始就遇到了绊脚石，不是吗？哼哼！

quagmire_key.en: I wish to pry into hidden supplies.

dead.en: Now with any luck it kicked the bucket.
dead.trans: 运气好的话，它应该是归西了。

generic.en: Hoohoo! It seems there's more in store!
generic.trans: 呼呼！似乎还有更多的东西在等着我们！

quagmire_grill_small_item.en: We need to build that, yes indeed.

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: He's gone, no matter how you look at it, hyuyu!
chesspiece_eyeofterror.trans: 不管你怎么看，他都已经走了，哼！

lightsout.en: They will not invite me across the threshold.
lightsout.trans: 他们不会邀请我迈过那个门槛。

generic.en: A house that I may never enter.
generic.trans: 我绝不会进去这个房子。

burnt.en: A silly prank to be sure.
burnt.trans: 绝对是个愚蠢的恶作剧。

generic.en: I don't have much use for this.
generic.trans: 我觉得那个对我没什么用。

wx78_scanner_item.en: The tiny tin terror's tuckered out!

feather_robin.en: To remind myself of its sweet beaky face.
feather_robin.trans: 让我想起它美丽的喙和动人的容颜。

alterguardian_phase3.en: The time is right to end this fight!
alterguardian_phase3.trans: 是时候结束这场战斗了！

wormlight.en: A glowing fruit. I am astute.
wormlight.trans: 发光的果实。我要提高警惕了。

kitcoon_grass.en: Ooo, the fingers your fur could prick, hyuyu.
kitcoon_grass.trans: 哦，你的毛皮可能会扎到别人的手，哼。

moon_altar_link.en: Oh, this is going to be fun! Hyuyuyu!

yoth_knightstick.en: Not a real horse, of course.

catcoon.en: I prefer playing with smarter mortals.
catcoon.trans: 我喜欢和聪明点的凡间生物玩。

marblebean_sapling.en: How does it grow? I just do not know!
marblebean_sapling.trans: 它怎么生长的？我就不知道啊！

relic.en: It's just a bunch of unfun stuff!

yellowmooneye.en: To make our mark once we embark.

quagmire_salmon.en: It doesn't like the air, oh no.

turf_carpetfloor2.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_carpetfloor2.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

deflated.en: On the ground, no more floating around.
deflated.trans: 落到了地上，再不到处晃。

held.en: Shall I say goodbye and let it fly?
held.trans: 要不要说再见，放它去飞天？

generic.en: I spy with my impish eye, something glowing high in the sky!

statuemaxwell.en: My old imp friends would like this, I think.
statuemaxwell.trans: 我的老魔鬼朋友们应该会喜欢这个东西。

dragonfruit.en: Plucked fresh from the dragon. Hyuyu!
dragonfruit.trans: 从火龙身上新鲜摘下的。哼！

lavaarena_boarlord.en: I have no real quest, I'm just here to jest!
lavaarena_boarlord.trans: 我没任务，就是来放松放松！

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: That plant has a mischievous streak after all, hyuyu!
bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.trans: 那株植物毕竟有调皮的倾向，哼!

polly_rogershat.en: A jaunty feather makes a hat look better.
polly_rogershat.trans: 俏皮的羽毛让帽子看起来更妙。

wagpunkhat.en: This should help me blow off some steam, hyuyu!
wagpunkhat.trans: 这个应该能帮我释放一点压力，哼！

stinger.en: Careful where you point that thing.

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.en: I make a point of checking checkpoints, hyuyu.

hermithouse_laundry.en: Crossing a boundary by stealing this laundry?

generic.en: She's made the decision to follow his vision?
generic.trans: 她铁了心要追随他的愿景？

poweroff.en: What a shame, these machines have no souls to claim.
poweroff.trans: 真可惜，这些机器里没有灵魂可以吮吸。

generic.en: Do you have any secrets for me?

walrushat.en: Do I look good in plaid?

waiting.en: Its heart is weeping for its friend.

generic.en: It is on the inside looking out.

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: Never underestimate the power of a strong quill.
oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.trans: 永远不要低估羽毛的强大力量。

red_cap_cooked.en: My head aches just looking at it!

ancienttree_seed.en: I see a seed to sow, hyuyu!
ancienttree_seed.trans: 我看到一颗待播的种子，哼！

mutator_warrior.en: A tasty treat for those tiny terrors!

dreadstonehat.en: A stone fortress for my brain.

bell.en: I believe it might bring forth delight.

armorslurper.en: If it means I eat less often, count me in!
armorslurper.trans: 如果能让我少吃点，我肯定愿意！

yotb.en: Our judge just may have something to say.
yotb.trans: 我们的评委也许想说两句。

generic.en: Enjoying the plush life? Hyuyuyu!
generic.trans: 喜欢填的满满的生活吗？哼！

boneshard.trans: 支离破碎，如同我的思绪！

mutatedbearger.en: I prefer the bare bear... barely.
mutatedbearger.trans: 基础款的熊……我都基本不喜欢。

hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.en: It doesn't fool 'round when you need to cool down!
hermitcrabtea_succulent_picked.trans: 清凉数它强，顷刻为你把火降。

book_fish.trans: 这本书讲的是鱼肉乡里的事情。

dragonchilisalad.en: Warly spends a lot of time on this stuff.
dragonchilisalad.trans: 沃利花了好多时间在这些东西上。

monstermeat.en: I hope *I* don't look like that inside.
monstermeat.trans: 希望我的肉不是这样的。

sewing_kit.en: Sew and stitch, it's quite the fix!
sewing_kit.trans: 缝缝补补，修理的好办法！

generic.en: A wisecracker like myself could crack it!
generic.trans: 像我这么厉害，应该可以砸开它！

out.en: A wisecracker like myself could crack it!
out.trans: 像我这么厉害，应该可以砸开它！

scandata.en: Hyuyuyu, I think our friend has some tricks up those tin sleeves!
scandata.trans: 哼，我们的铁皮朋友袖子里藏了不少把戏！

wagstaff_tool_1.en: Hoohoo! You're not from around this plane, are you?
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 呼呼！你不是来自这个世界的，对吧？

batnose.en: Oh my, looks like somebody blew it.
batnose.trans: 哎呀，看起来有人搞砸了。

wagstaff_tool_2.en: You belong in the hand of that old man.
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 你理应回到那个老人手里。

armor_sanity.en: Keeps the flesh body safe! The mind's another story.
armor_sanity.trans: 能保护肉身！心灵的话就不知道了。

wagstaff_tool_3.en: This may be what I'm looking for, or not!
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 这个也许是我要找的东西，也许不是！

wagstaff_tool_4.en: Oooh how fun! I can't be sure if that's the right one!
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 喔，真有趣！我也说不准是不是它！

wagstaff_tool_5.en: What a fun game, finding tools from another plane!
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 多好玩的游戏啊，找到了另一个世界的工具！

panettone.en: This holiday bread is all in your head!
panettone.trans: 所谓的假日面包不过是梦幻泡影！

generic.en: A flower that attracts a friend.

wx78module_maxhealth2.en: Are you the brightest bulb of the bunch?
wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 你是夜空中最闪亮的灯泡么？

book_fire.en: We've no use for tomes from where I roam.
book_fire.trans: 鸿篇巨著，虽与我来自一处，却对我毫无帮助。

steeringwheel_item.en: I can see the appeal of a steering wheel.

wall_stone.en: To keep you out, or keep me in?

oceanfish_medium_7.en: I'm afraid your journey has been cut short.
oceanfish_medium_7.trans: 恐怕你的旅程要提前结束了。

glassspike.en: Sharp and pointy as my tooth!

oceanfish_medium_6.en: I'm afraid your journey has been cut short.
oceanfish_medium_6.trans: 恐怕你的旅程要提前结束了。

oceanfish_medium_5.en: It looks like nature played quite the prank on this one.
oceanfish_medium_5.trans: 看起来大自然跟它玩了个恶作剧。

oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 喔，多么令人愉悦的迷信啊！

oceanfish_medium_3.en: How dandy indeed! You've a soul that I need.
oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 漂亮啊！我需要你的灵魂。

wathgrithr_shield.en: She'll wield this shield on the battlefield.

oceanfish_medium_2.en: If I hold it up, it becomes an upright bass!
oceanfish_medium_2.trans: 我把它立起来，它就是一条站着的鱼了！

petrified_tree.trans: 哟！一棵石头般冰冷的树！

seedpouch.en: For my gardening needs, a place to store seeds!
seedpouch.trans: 工欲善其事，必先利其器！

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.en: A bloom to do a bit of good!

quagmire_potato.en: Mortals like this in all its forms. Will a wyrm?
quagmire_potato.trans: 土豆，土豆泥凡人们都喜欢。大蛇呢？

generic.en: Did I hear "one o'clock sharp", or "one sharp clock"? Hyuyu!
generic.trans: 我是听到“一点整”还是“一只锋利的钟”？哼！

broken.en: We can't perform the ritual like this.

staffed.en: It's time! Call upon the moon!

generic.en: What are the conditions for this ritual?

yotr_decor_1_item.en: I should place this rabbit now that I've nabbed it.

rhinodrill.en: Is that double I do see?

dragonheadhat.en: Me and my horns should be the head!

generic.en: Why would I row when I can be towed?
generic.trans: 能被牵着自己走，谁还拿桨自己划？

activated.en: I'll just sit back while it keeps me on track.
activated.trans: 我舒服坐好，看它自己跑。

farm_hoe.en: I've about had my fill of tilling and toiling.
farm_hoe.trans: 我已经受过了辛苦犁地。

rook_nightmare.en: Eep! Play nice with the imp!

chesspiece_twinsofterror.trans: 多么吸引眼球的雕塑啊，哼！

eggplant.en: I've never seen such a thing before!
eggplant.trans: 我以前从来没见过这东西。

book_temperature.en: Hyuyuyu, mortals have such funny ideas.
book_temperature.trans: 哼哼，凡人们的主意真是好笑。

plant.en: The shimmer of a soul lurks below.
plant.trans: 下面藏着一个闪闪发光的灵魂。

dirt.en: A simple pile of dirt and muck.

mooseegg.en: The egg of that most fearsome creature.

carnivaldecor_plant.en: We can take a small bit of the Cawnival wherever we go.
carnivaldecor_plant.trans: 无论我们走到哪里，都可以带一丁点的鸦年华的精神。

hungry.en: No worries, lunch is right around the bend.
hungry.trans: 不着急，午餐马上就要有了。

skeleton.en: I don't think she's exactly on the mend.
skeleton.trans: 她身体没有要好转的迹象。

starving.en: Does no one have some seeds to lend?
starving.trans: 有没有人能借点种子给我？

dead.en: It seems you went and met your end.

occupied.trans: 你好啊，挥着翅膀的歌唱家朋友。

sleeping.en: No more sleepless nights you'll spend.

generic.en: A place where little birds are penned.

fish_box.en: Fill it to the brim with bream!

held.en: My claws will sting you right back.
held.trans: 我的爪子马上叮咬回你。

generic.en: Please don't sting my delicate imp skin.
generic.trans: 请别叮咬我吹弹可破的恶魔肌肤。

chesspiece_daywalker2.en: The hog heaved through heaps of junk.
chesspiece_daywalker2.trans: 这头猪在垃圾堆里反复横跳。

generic.en: A massive mushroom! Did I quaff a shrinking potion?
generic.trans: 好大的蘑菇！我是喝了缩小药水了吗？

moonrockidol.en: What, pray tell, do you desire?

featherpencil.en: Use this quill, I will, I will.

quagmire_park_angel2.en: This one's already got a beard.

yotb.en: Our judge just may have something to say.
yotb.trans: 我们的评委也许想说两句。

generic.en: Enjoying the plush life? Hyuyuyu!
generic.trans: 喜欢填的满满的生活吗？哼！

beast_blueprint.en: Lucky, hm? Perhaps it's made with fairy gold.
beast_blueprint.trans: 幸运物么？也许是用妖精的金子做的。

burnt.en: It looks like I missed all the fun!
burnt.trans: 看起来我错过了绚烂的部分！

generic.en: Knock knock! Won't you let me in?
generic.trans: 咚咚咚！你不会不让我进去吧？

overloaded.en: It fired up and fizzled out, hyuyu!

generic.en: Ooohoohoo! The mortal learned magic!
generic.trans: 呼呼！凡人都学会魔法了！

book_sleep.trans: 知识就是力量。字面意思上的。

critter_bulbin.en: Once you dwelt in a rotten wood, now it seems you're here for good!
critter_bulbin.trans: 你从腐林来，来了就不离开！

venting.en: Heehee! How crass to pester with gas!
venting.trans: 嘿嘿！骚扰用臭屁，实在太粗鄙！

sleeping.en: Not a peep, it's fast asleep.

generic.en: Don't make light of that mite!
generic.trans: 那螨虫虽小，但不可轻藐！

recharging.en: These clocks, you will find, need some time to unwind.
recharging.trans: 你会发现，这些时钟需要一些时间来放松。

generic.en: Mortals keep coming up with such funny tricks!
generic.trans: 凡人总是能想出如此有趣的招数！

lunarplant_kit.en: A stitch here and there for a quick repair.
lunarplant_kit.trans: 到处缝几针就能快速修好。

playing.en: You must be quick to feed the chicks.
playing.trans: 喂鸟的诀窍是争分夺秒。

generic.en: Allow me to propose a trade: one shiny trinket to play your game.
generic.trans: 请允许我提出一个交易：给你闪亮的饰品来玩你的游戏。

rubble.en: Useless rocks, they seem to be.
rubble.trans: 好笑是一些没用的石头。

mask_sagehat.trans: 很难鄙视这种伪装样式！

held.trans: 哈啰，哈啰，古怪的橙色魂魄。

generic.en: Does it have a soul, one wonders?
generic.trans: 很难不去想它有没有灵魂。

sleeping.en: Good night, sleep tight, don't let the humans bite.

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: Always something to learn where gardens are concerned.
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 种地的知识值得我们学习。

malbatross_feather.en: A feather for me, from the bird of the sea.

kitcoon_rocky.en: Oh my friend, why the stone face?
kitcoon_rocky.trans: 嗷，我的朋友，你的脸怎么像石头一样硬？

blowdart_lava.en: A gust of breath means flaming death!
blowdart_lava.trans: 一口气就吹出来燃烧的死亡。

moose_nesting_ground.en: It's a place to nest and rest.
moose_nesting_ground.trans: 是个筑巢和休息的地方。

turf_fungus_green.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_fungus_green.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

wobster_moonglass.en: That will be a hard shell to crack, hyuyu!

farm_soil_debris.en: I'm afraid I'll have to banish it from the garden.
farm_soil_debris.trans: 恐怕我得把它从花园驱逐出去。

bullkelp_root.en: We plucked this whip from the side of the ship.

armor_yoth_knight.trans: 横祸将至？马儿盔甲正当时！

cookiecuttershell.en: The creature fell, now I take its shell!

earmuffshat.en: They weren't made for floppy ears.
earmuffshat.trans: 我的耳朵不但大，而且还老晃，这个怕不适合吧。

spider_dropper.en: You look like you want to play!

moonspiderden.en: I should not like to see inside!
moonspiderden.trans: 我不想知道里面有什么！

alterguardian_phase3dead.en: Shall we see what's left behind?
alterguardian_phase3dead.trans: 我们要不要看看还剩下了什么？

1.en: Poor soul.

2.en: Poor soul.

1.en: Poor soul.

2.en: Poor soul.

1.en: Poor soul.

2.en: Poor soul.

bananabush.en: Hyuyu, little shrub, are you waving at me?
bananabush.trans: 哼哼，小灌木，你是在朝我招手吗？

sleep.en: See? Stop tidying and appreciate the chaos around you!
sleep.trans: 看到没？停下你的整理，欣赏身边的混乱！

charging.trans: 该让齿轮休息一下了，亲爱的。

charged.trans: 该让齿轮休息一下了，亲爱的。

off.trans: 该让齿轮休息一下了，亲爱的。

generic.en: Here I am trying to make a lovely mess, and you keep cleaning it up!
generic.trans: 我想把这里弄得一团糟，结果你一直收拾！

generic.en: I hop, you hop. Friends til the end!
generic.trans: 我跳，你也跳。一生一世做朋友！

sleeping.en: Sleep fast little hopper.
sleeping.trans: 蹦蹦跳跳的小家伙睡的真快。

fireballstaff.trans: 哎呀，多么令人愉悦的混乱啊！

generic.en: They would not roam, too far from home.
generic.trans: 他们不会走的离家太远。

empty.en: The walruses aren't too keen. There's none here to be seen!

dug_bananabush.en: Hyuyu, little shrub, are you waving at me?
dug_bananabush.trans: 哼哼，小灌木，你是在朝我招手吗？

treegrowthsolution.en: It'll really rib to your sticks.

eyeturret_item.en: To build it would be all it took to fell my foes by deadly look.
eyeturret_item.trans: 建好了以后，就可以用致命的凝视击败我的对手了。

fence_rotator.en: A sword against fences... we've all lost our senses!

wx78module_heat.en: Are you the brightest bulb of the bunch?
wx78module_heat.trans: 你是夜空中最闪亮的灯泡么？

moqueca.en: I don't really like human food.

multitool_axe_pickaxe.en: It couldn't decide which to be, so it became both.
multitool_axe_pickaxe.trans: 实在决定不了要哪个，所以就兼顾了。

cave_entrance_ruins.en: Let me have a peek inside!

yotr_token.en: A duel, a duel! To arms!

kabobs.en: More mortal food it seems, it seems.

molehat.en: It lets me see on every plane!
molehat.trans: 戴上后，在每个世界都有视野了！

fence_item.en: It's of no use there on the ground.
fence_item.trans: 单单这个放在地上没用。

marblepillar.en: A column of marble, so tall and so cold.

quagmire_oven_item.en: We need to build that, yes indeed.

bluegem.trans: 海床上长出的忧郁深蓝。

squid.en: An eerie eye to see the sea.
squid.trans: 好奇的眼睛凝视着大海。

teleportato_potato.en: It's a thing. For the thing!

saltlick.en: I've been told I don't make a lick of sense.

pond.en: I could gaze upon my reflection all day!
pond.trans: 我可以盯着我的倒影欣赏一天！

armorskeleton.en: This fashion's all the rage... it's an external rib cage!
armorskeleton.trans: 充满了愤怒的时尚风格，肋骨架霸气外露！

bombed.en: The effect of a good soak is no joke!

generic.en: I don't want to get my fur wet.

empty.en: Oh me, oh my, the spring's run dry.

dreadstone.en: A stone as black as night.
dreadstone.trans: 石头，一块像黑夜一样黑的石头。

chesspiece_wagboss_lunar.en: What error caused such a terror?

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: Does appear we're not welcome here.

generic.en: I could catch a wink, I think.

burnt.en: Burnt down, down to the ground.

bearger_fur.en: You won't be eating me today!

eel.trans: 那玩意的灵魂都是滑溜溜的。

diviningrodstart.en: And now begins a thrilling game!
diviningrodstart.trans: 一个刺激的游戏要开始了！

pondeel.trans: 那玩意的灵魂都是滑溜溜的。

spider_water.en: They're just getting their feet wet.

doll_blueprint.trans: 如同洋娃娃一样迷人！哼！

boat_bumper_crabking.en: A princely reward for a battle endured.
boat_bumper_crabking.trans: 前有激烈战斗爽，后有皇家奖赏。

quagmire_spotspice_ground.en: Mortals say grinding it brings out the flavor.
quagmire_spotspice_ground.trans: 凡人们说捣碎了更出风味。

acorn_cooked.en: I'll only eat it if I have to.
acorn_cooked.trans: 没得选我才会吃这玩意。

spider_healer_item.en: I think I'll make do without eating that goo.
spider_healer_item.trans: 我就不吃那黏糊的玩意。

ghost.en: Are you gonna eat that?

firestarter.en: Hyuyu! What pranks have you been playing?

murderer.en: He's stealing all the good souls!
murderer.trans: 他在偷走所有好的灵魂！

attacker.en: Hey! What's with that impish grin?
attacker.trans: 喂！笑的这么邪恶是要干嘛？

reviver.en: Hyuyu, I would have eaten that soul were I you.
reviver.trans: 哼，我要是你，我就吃了那个灵魂。

generic.en: Oh! What a handsome devil.

dock_woodposts_item.en: I'll fix it in post, hyuyu!
dock_woodposts_item.trans: 谁都不能阻止我立柱子！

ghost.en: What a tasty looking soul!
ghost.trans: 看起来很好吃的一个灵魂！

firestarter.en: %s, you have a funnybone after all!

murderer.en: Eep! Don't banish me from this plane!
murderer.trans: 额！别把我从这个世界放逐！

attacker.en: Not the horns!

reviver.en: Thank-you, thank-you %s!

generic.en: He has a bit of magic, that one.

purebrilliance.en: Hyuyu, it tickles my impish brain!
purebrilliance.trans: 哼，它给我的恶魔大脑挠了一下痒痒！

mask_treehat.en: A mask to place upon my face.
mask_treehat.trans: 脸上戴着面具，自有一番心绪。

compostwrap.en: It's poop. So the plants won't droop.

nonslipgritboosted.en: Last time I slided, I nearly dieded. Hyuyu!
nonslipgritboosted.trans: 上次滑一跤，差点命丧掉。哼哼！

quagmire_parkspike.en: A wall, a wall, so very tall.

generic.en: Hyuyu! Do not think to poison me!

gravy.en: It sits in a boat that doesn't float.
gravy.trans: 它坐在一艘不会浮的船里。

burning.en: I was just yearning for the smell of burning.
burning.trans: 我渴望闻到火烧的味道。

generic.en: Ol' One-Eyed has gone and died!

maxwellphonograph.trans: 哦，是音乐！整个人开心起来了！

junk_pile.en: Could it hide a surprise inside?
junk_pile.trans: 里面会不会隐藏着一个惊喜？

carrot.en: Non-imps like to eat things like this.
carrot.trans: 非恶魔族的都喜欢吃这个。

retrieving_item.en: Hyuyu! My treasure will soon be revealed!
retrieving_item.trans: 哼！我的宝藏很快就能找到了！

holding_item.en: I always enjoy the game more than the prize, hyuyu!
holding_item.trans: 我一般注重过程，不注重结果，哼！

generic.en: Hoohoo! The mortals invented a snatching machine!
generic.trans: 呼呼！凡人们发明了一个小吃机！

decor_lamp.en: This little lamp's light is quite a delight.

generic.en: Chest to impress.

i_won.en: We won with wit and cunning (and a little bit of running).
i_won.trans: 我们靠着机智取胜（还有一点点跑步）。

someone_else_won.en: {winner} put us to the test, and it turns out they're the best.
someone_else_won.trans: {winner} 考验了我们, 夺取了胜利。

generic.en: Surely the cleverest will win.

unwritten.en: Nothing to be seen here, I fear.
unwritten.trans: 恐怕这里没什么好看的。

generic.en: "You are here" it says, it says.

burnt.en: A silly prank to be sure.
burnt.trans: 绝对是个愚蠢的恶作剧。

nitre_formation.en: After a while it formed a pile.
nitre_formation.trans: 过一会它就形成了一堆。

poop.trans: 凡人们的消化系统真是恶心。

wortox_souljar.en: I'll need more souls to store.
wortox_souljar.trans: 我要多找点灵魂存起来。

mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.en: Now mayhaps, we won't get zapped!
mastupgrade_lightningrod_item.trans: 现在也许我们不会被雷劈了！

yotr_decor_2_item.en: I should place this rabbit now that I've nabbed it.

beeswax_spray.en: A frightful fragrance for freezing flora!
beeswax_spray.trans: 散发恐怖香气，让植物冻结停滞！

finished.en: I do say that did the trick!

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: Now that's bending the rules a little, hyuyu!
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 这是在弯曲规则了，哼哼！

turf_sinkhole.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_sinkhole.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.en: Imagine what a fun prank it would be to replace these with real worms...
carnivalgame_feedchicks_food.trans: 想象一下，如果把这些东西换成真正的虫子，那将是一个多么有趣的恶作剧……

wall_stone_item.en: It's of no use there on the ground.
wall_stone_item.trans: 单单这个放在地上没用。

complete.en: That looks right as rain, it does it does!

generic.en: Still could use a piece or two.
generic.trans: 好像还差一两块，不全啊。

funny.en: A silly look, that's to be sure!

moonglass.en: In its green sheen I see selene.
moonglass.trans: 我在它绿色的光泽中瞥见了月神塞勒涅。

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: I would root for this brute!

hawaiianshirt.en: Oh no, that's not really my style.

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: We're almost ready for the fun to begin!
carnivalgame_herding_kit.trans: 我们几乎已经准备好了，可以开始玩了！

warglet.en: You wouldn't want to eat me, imps give terrible indigestion!
warglet.trans: 别吃我，恶魔肉不好消化！

burnt.en: Now we're destined to the dark.
burnt.trans: 我们注定要活在黑暗中了。

off.en: It could use a little spark.

on.en: A spotted spotlight to chase away the dark.

koalefant_summer.en: A gentle beast with tiny horns.

critter_perdling.en: You're so sweet, I could just gobble you up.
critter_perdling.trans: 你这么可爱，真的忍不住想吞你下去。

kitcoonden_kit.en: They're here to play, or so they say, hyuyu!
kitcoonden_kit.trans: 它们在此间玩耍，累了就回家，哼！

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: What a fun prank for the fish!
oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.trans: 这个捉弄鱼的恶作剧太好玩了！

recharging.en: These clocks, you will find, need some time to unwind.
recharging.trans: 你会发现，这些时钟需要一些时间来放松。

generic.en: Mortals keep coming up with such funny tricks!
generic.trans: 凡人总是能想出如此有趣的招数！

powcake.en: Hyuyu! This cake packs a wallop!
powcake.trans: 哼！爆发力十足的蛋糕啊！

generic.en: I can never die! Hyuyu!

alterguardianhatshard.en: It won't be too hard to find a use for this shard.
alterguardianhatshard.trans: 要找到这个碎片的用途不会太难。

smallghost.en: I prefer souls with more meat on their bones... metaphorically speaking.
smallghost.trans: 我更喜欢肉多一点的灵魂……这是一种暗喻。

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: Rain or shine, the fish will be mine!
oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.trans: 无论刮风下雨，我总能钓到鱼！

battlesong_fireresistance.en: Singing is good for the soul.

builtup.en: A little care can cause remarkable transformations.
builtup.trans: 一点点的关爱就能带来巨大的改变。

generic.en: What a sad little house for that cranky old louse.
generic.trans: 暴躁老婆子，住在破房子。

generic.en: Bishop made of polished stone.

mask_toadyhat.en: A mask fit for the task!

quagmire_sapbucket.en: It's for filling up with sap.

generic.en: Mortals come up with the funniest things.
generic.trans: 凡人们真会发明好玩的东西。

activated.en: It brought me here, so it must attract trouble, hyuyu!
activated.trans: 它把我带到了这里，所以它一定会引来麻烦，哼哼！

shadowheart.en: Oh, how neat! It continues to beat.

sweettea.en: A little sip will do the trick.

generic.en: That looks like it could be my ride!
generic.trans: 看起来可以当我的坐骑！

open.en: Watch my impression of mortal food.
open.trans: 看看我对凡间食物的印象吧。

leafloaf.en: Even the mortals don't seem to care for it.
leafloaf.trans: 连凡人似乎都对它不屑一顾。

battlesong_instant_panic.en: Oooh, yay! Are we putting on a play?

quagmire_altar_queen.en: My vessel is not her vassal.

hermitcrabtea_petals_evil.trans: 想把理智扔进沟？选它一次疯个够！

wathgrithrhat.en: I hope it fits over my horns.

dragonbodyhat.en: Let's play imp in the middle!
dragonbodyhat.trans: 咱们在中间玩恶魔游戏吧！

moon_altar_icon.en: You hid away with quite some skill, you're lucky that I had a drill!
moon_altar_icon.trans: 你藏得那么深，幸好我的功夫真！

cursed_monkey_token.en: Oh me oh my, I couldn't leave it if I tried!

carrat_ghostracer.en: I had a feeling she liked to play games too, hyuyu!
carrat_ghostracer.trans: 我有感受她生前也喜欢玩游戏，哼！

generic.en: The tree furnace burns in earnest.

mermwatchtower_noking.en: Guards with no king, like puppets with no string.
mermwatchtower_noking.trans: 守卫无王，就像木偶无线。

trap_teeth.en: I hope this isn't too cruel.

quagmire_key_park.en: No gate can stop a sneaky imp!
quagmire_key_park.trans: 什么门也挡不住一个神偷恶魔！

wall_ruins_item.en: It's of no use there on the ground.
wall_ruins_item.trans: 单单这个放在地上没用。

tourtiere.en: A pie, not sweet, but filled with meat.
tourtiere.trans: 这张饼不甜，但是都是肉馅。

held.trans: 小小的灵魂不安着，扑腾着。

generic.en: Some natural light to grant me sight.
generic.trans: 自然光源，让我能看见点东西。

wall_hay_item.en: It's of no use there on the ground.
wall_hay_item.trans: 单单这个放在地上没用。

wagboss_robot.en: No need for alarm, it means us no harm...
wagboss_robot.trans: 不必紧张，它无意让我们受伤	……

blackflag.en: It's inspiring me to make a little mischief of my own.
blackflag.trans: 它激励我去做一些属于自己的小恶作剧。

alterguardian_contained.en: Oh ho! It seems he has some tricks up his sleeve.
alterguardian_contained.trans: 哈哈！看来他还藏了两把刷子。

pirate_stash.en: What a splendid "X"! Well worth the trip.

roastturkey.en: It certainly looks like a turkey.

generic.en: Dazzling!

burning.en: Twiddle dee dee, a burning tree!
burning.trans: 噼里啪啦，一棵烧着的树！

generic.en: A hearty tree of dark green leaves.
generic.trans: 粗壮的大树长满了墨绿的叶子。

battlesong_container.en: I've been told I can carry a tune.
battlesong_container.trans: 有人也说过我能载歌载舞。

costume_blacksmith_body.en: Hyuyuyu, oh this is a fun game!
costume_blacksmith_body.trans: 哼哼，这个游戏可太好玩了！

flint.en: My eye was caught by its dull glint.
flint.trans: 暗淡的散射吸引了我的目光。

ancient_altar_broken.en: Oh dear oh dear, that will not do.

wx78module_maxhunger.en: Are you the brightest bulb of the bunch?
wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 你是夜空中最闪亮的灯泡么？

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.en: What's it growing? Why's it glowing?

walterhat.trans: 小恶魔和制服很少搭的来。

oceanfish_small_9.trans: 一个喜欢恶作剧的同道中人啊，明白了！

playing.en: For this merry game, squashing bugs is the aim.
playing.trans: 欢乐游戏，目的——压扁虫子。

generic.en: Allow me to propose a trade: one shiny trinket to play your game.
generic.trans: 请允许我提出一个交易：给你闪亮的饰品来玩你的游戏。

oceanfish_small_6.en: I'm afraid it's time for you to leaf, hyuyu!

battlesong_durability.en: Singing is good for the soul.

oceanfish_small_8.en: It has such a sunny disposition! Hyuyu!

oceanfish_small_7.en: What might happen if I planted it in the garden?
oceanfish_small_7.trans: 我把它种在花园会长出什么？

oceanfish_small_2.en: This soul is so small it's hardly worth snatching.
oceanfish_small_2.trans: 这个灵魂太小了，不知道我出手去抓。

oceanfish_small_1.en: Splash, splish, it's a tiny fish!

beehive.en: One swift kick and it becomes a great prank.
beehive.trans: 快速的踢一脚，就是一个很棒的恶作剧了。

oceanfish_small_4.en: It's hardly bigger than a minnow!

wall_moonrock.en: To keep you out, or keep me in?
wall_moonrock.trans: 把别人挡在外面也就把自己关在了里面。

burning.en: That's sort of a mean prank.

generic.en: Good day to you, sir!

cookedmeat.en: I don't really like having food in my stomach.
cookedmeat.trans: 我不喜欢胃里留有食物。

oceanfish_small_3.en: You took the bait, now suffer your fate!
oceanfish_small_3.trans: 既然咬了钩，那就面对你的命运吧！

ghost.en: The culinarian's become the culination, hyuyu!
ghost.trans: 做饭的自己成了别人的盘中餐，哼！

firestarter.en: Oh, are we playing pranks today, %s?
firestarter.trans: 嘿，咱们今天玩恶作剧吗，%s？

murderer.en: Don't hurt me-hee-hee!
murderer.trans: 别伤害我，嘿！

attacker.en: I think %s's been causing some trouble. How fun!
attacker.trans: 看起来%s又在惹麻烦了。真有意思！

reviver.en: I guess %s doesn't have a taste for souls.
reviver.trans: 我猜%s不喜欢灵魂的味道。

generic.en: %s sure likes food. I don't get humans.

quagmire_trader_merm.en: What a funny face you have!

generic.en: I'll tell you nothin', puffin.

sleeping.en: Hyuyu, catching some shuteye are we?
sleeping.trans: 哼，咱们闭上眼睛休息会儿？

record_efs.en: Oh dear, what have we here?

poweroff.en: I won't tell the mortals it's here, it'll just get their poor hopes up.
poweroff.trans: 我不会告诉凡人们它在这里，免得他们又心存念想。

generic.en: My my, someone didn't want this door opened.
generic.trans: 哎呀呀，有人故意不想让这扇门被打开。

firestarter.en: Oooh, mind if I join in?

ghost.en: You're looking much tastier than usual, %s!
ghost.trans: 你比平常看起来更好吃，%s！

murderer.en: You wouldn't kill an imp in the prime of his life, would you?
murderer.trans: 你不会夺走正值壮年的小恶魔的生命吧？

attacker.en: Hyuyuyu, I don't think she liked my last prank.
attacker.trans: 哼哼，她好像不太喜欢我的上个恶作剧。

reviver.en: Hyuyu, %s doesn't seem to be wise to soul power, thankfully.
reviver.trans: 哼哼，还好%s不懂得运用灵魂的力量。

generic.en: Have you been anytime interesting lately, %s?
generic.trans: 最近有什么有意思的事情吗，%s？

tentacle_pillar_arm.en: It doesn't have anything to prove.

dead_sea_bones.en: Bones from the sea, these look to be!

boat_bumper_kelp.en: Some friendly help from fronds of kelp.

wagpunk_bits.en: I'll have to settle for these scraps of metal.

deerclops.en: So large, so rude, so full of 'tude!

hermithotspring_constr.en: You must build before it's filled.

manrabbit_tail.en: A tail from those great big bunnies.

batnose_cooked.en: This smells! I think it's gone off!

beefalotreat.en: A beef so sweet deserves a treat.

reviving.en: I do believe I'll take my leave!

generic.en: A corpse is a corpse, of course, of course.
generic.trans: 尸体就是尸体，不过如此而已。

generic.en: Mortals do love their trinkets.
generic.trans: 凡人确实喜欢他们的小饰品。

collapsedchest.en: Infinite space, gone without a trace?

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: What kind of goodies will it have, I wonder?
carnival_prizebooth_kit.trans: 不知道它有什么好东西？

alterguardianhat.en: It tells me the most delicious secrets, hyuyu!
alterguardianhat.trans: 它告诉我了最美味的秘密，哼哼！

compost.en: Oh, I could pull some fun pranks with this.
compost.trans: 哦，我可以用这个来搞一些有趣的恶作剧。

generic.en: Let us celebrate!

empty.en: Rumble and grumble, it wants a torch!

quagmire_mealingstone.en: I do enjoy this mortal chore.
quagmire_mealingstone.trans: 我还挺喜欢这个凡人的体力活。

cannonball_rock_item.en: Oh what a sinking feeling it brings!
cannonball_rock_item.trans: 看到它难免心都沉下去了！

pepper_oversized.en: That will put some pep in someone's step, hyuyuyu!

cookiecutter.en: Well, aren't you a funny fellow!
cookiecutter.trans: 好吧，你真是个有趣的家伙！

wasphive.en: Do I want to start some mischief?

batcave.en: Where the bats lie in wait.
batcave.trans: 蝙蝠们伺机而动的地方。

butterflymuffin.en: Muffin to see here, my dear.

balatro_machine.en: Hey joker, let's play some poker!
balatro_machine.trans: 嘿小丑，玩把扑克练练手！

saddle_war.en: I am an imp of war!

perogies.en: Mortal food, this seems to be.

dumbbell_gem.en: He's turned those gemstones into gymstones, hyuyu!
dumbbell_gem.trans: 他把宝石做成了健身机器，哼！

spidergland.en: It's squishy, yes oh yes it is!

turf_marsh.en: Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.
turf_marsh.trans: 地板还是天花板，取决于你的角度。

wagpunk_workstation.en: What have we here? His intentions are never clear!
wagpunk_workstation.trans: 这是什么？他的意图向来晦涩！

yotb.en: Our judge just may have something to say.
yotb.trans: 我们的评委也许想说两句。

generic.en: Enjoying the plush life? Hyuyuyu!
generic.trans: 喜欢填的满满的生活吗？哼！

yotd_anchor_item.en: Such funny ship things I could build.

stump.en: It's leafy life was cut short.
stump.trans: 枝繁叶茂的生命骤然被砍断。

generic.en: Is it so scary for a tree to be hairy?

wobster_sheller_dead_cooked.en: Oh dear, the best part's already gone.
wobster_sheller_dead_cooked.trans: 噢亲爱的，最好的部分已经没了。

firestarter.en: Hyuyu, how funny you are, %s!

ghost.en: Don't worry, I'm not gonna eat you.

murderer.en: I was just playing around! Please don't hurt me!
murderer.trans: 我就是瞎玩的！别伤害我！

attacker.en: I don't like the game you're playing.

reviver.en: Thanks for not eating that soul, %s!

generic.en: Do my claws scare you? Hyuyu!
generic.trans: 我的爪子有没有吓到你？哼！

shell_cluster.en: I wonder if there's any goodies inside?
shell_cluster.trans: 不知道里面有没有什么好东西？

generic.en: Spin, spin, spin the wheel of fate!
generic.trans: 旋转，旋转，旋转吧命运之轮！

burnt.en: That prank went a bit too far.

redpouch.en: The luck magic is practically radiating off it.

cookbook.en: Oh what shall I cook up next? Hyuyu!
cookbook.trans: 我接着做点什么好呢？哼！

potato.en: Mortals like this in all its forms.
potato.trans: 这东西做成什么样凡人们都喜欢。

lots.en: Oh good! The mortals get cranky when they're hungry.
lots.trans: 好吧！凡人们一饿就急了。

some.en: I don't want them, but the mortals might.
some.trans: 我不想要，但是凡人们可能想。

stuffed.en: The mortals will be very, very pleased.

rotten.en: I don't think the mortals will eat that.

burnt.en: No more mushrooms to have here!

empty.en: Just a log if you ask me!
empty.trans: 如果你问我，就剩一根木头了！

mermguard_shadow.en: And they say there are no second chances, hyuyu!
mermguard_shadow.trans: 谁说的没有第二次机会，哼！

burning.en: I'd love some toast to go with this roast!

reviving.en: The brute is reviving. Who did the unaliving?
reviving.trans: 蛮兽在复活。谁将它命夺？

generic.en: Hibernation? More like termination! Hyuyu!

shark.en: Don't eat me, you'll get fur stuck in your teeth!
shark.trans: 不要吃我，我的毛发会塞在你的牙齿上的！

tophat.en: A stylish imp I'm fit to be!

wagstaff_npc.trans: 哼哼！他不是全部都在那！

armor_bramble.en: Who'd like to give an imp a hug? Hyuyu!
armor_bramble.trans: 谁想要抱一抱小恶魔？哼！

boat_ancient_item.en: This old boat will surely float!

minerhat.en: A head light to brighten my dreary thoughts.
minerhat.trans: 头灯啊，照亮我的恐惧吧。

leafymeatburger.en: Mortals seem to get quite irritated when you mess with their food.
leafymeatburger.trans: 凡人在你弄乱他们的食物时，似乎很不爽。

book_elemental.en: Well, it won't summon an imp!

latkes.en: I wonder what would happen if I took a bite.
latkes.trans: 我很好奇我咬一口后它会变成什么样子。

generic.en: Soul delivery machine.

quagmire_park_angel.en: I could draw a little moustache on it when no one's looking.
quagmire_park_angel.trans: 等没人的时候，我可以偷偷给它脸上画个胡子。

eyeplant.en: My oh my, what a lovely eye.
eyeplant.trans: 瞧瞧，多么可爱的眼睛啊。

fish_cooked.en: At least it isn't suffering anymore.

boatfragment03.en: Flotsam and jetsam, bits and bobs.
boatfragment03.trans: 一片两片三四片，小船碎在海滩边。

healingstaff.en: A little heal will improve how you feel.
healingstaff.trans: 来点治疗，会让你感觉好一点。

goggleshat.en: I have to keep up appearances.

boatfragment05.en: Flotsam and jetsam, bits and bobs.
boatfragment05.trans: 一片两片三四片，小船碎在海滩边。

boatfragment04.en: Flotsam and jetsam, bits and bobs.
boatfragment04.trans: 一片两片三四片，小船碎在海滩边。

generic.en: My hooves would get stuck in it.

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: We're almost ready for the fun to begin!
carnivalgame_shooting_kit.trans: 我们几乎已经准备好了，可以开始玩了！

moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 月光般疯狂的发明，哼哼！

ruins_bat.en: A spiked hunk of ill intent!

bird_egg.en: An egg from a bird, or so I've heard.
bird_egg.trans: 一颗鸟蛋，反正我听说是。

moonstorm_static_item.en: It makes my fur stand on end.
moonstorm_static_item.trans: 它让我身上的毛都竖起来了。

dead.en: Dead as dead as dead could be!

generic.en: Sharpest spider, soon to strike.
generic.trans: 十分危险的蜘蛛，马上就会发动袭击。

sleeping.en: Get some rest, little pest.

held.trans: 哈啰，哈啰，古怪的橙色魂魄。

generic.en: Does it have a soul, one wonders?
generic.trans: 很难不去想它有没有灵魂。

sleeping.en: Good night, sleep tight, don't let the humans bite.

lore3.en: Oh dears. They appears to have spears, I fears!
lore3.trans: 啊噢。它们手持长矛，令我心焦！

lore1.en: The Monarch is lost to the Dark!

anchor_item.en: Such funny ship things I could build.

yellowgem.en: From lava floes bellow this glimmering yellow.

charlie_lecturn.en: Hmm, what part to play today?

atrium_overgrowth.en: Ooo, there's some naughty magic at play here!
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 喔，这里流淌着顽皮的魔法！

quagmire_salt_rack_item.en: It's meant to go above a pond.

berries_cooked.en: I hear they last longer this way.
berries_cooked.trans: 听说这么处理可以保存的久一点。

basalt.en: Big, big rock, for sure, for sure.

mushtree_moon.en: Someone played a prank on it.
mushtree_moon.trans: 有人跟它玩了个恶作剧。

spiderqueen.en: Your majesty, please don't hurt me!

tacklestation.en: Let's build a better fish trap, hyuyu!
tacklestation.trans: 咱们建个更好的鱼陷阱，哼！

growing.en: Grow big, grow tall, or not at all!
growing.trans: 长大，长高，或者不长也行！

ready.en: The mortals want your tasty eats.
ready.trans: 凡人们想吃你的好吃的。

withered.en: It does not seem to be in the highest spirits.

generic.en: A leafy little plant I see.
generic.trans: 看到一颗小树，枝繁叶茂。

quagmire_pot_hanger_item.en: We need to build that, yes indeed.

quagmire_turnip_cooked.en: Cooked, but not into a dish.
quagmire_turnip_cooked.trans: 已烹饪，但是没做成一道菜。

raincoat.en: The puddles wait out there for me!

inert.en: This castle is missing its crown jewels.
inert.trans: 这座城堡少了皇冠上的宝石。

generic.en: Another cursed soul.

hungry.en: Would you like a snack from my backpack?
hungry.trans: 要不要从背包拿点零食给你吃？

starving.trans: 即便饿着肚子看着还是很怪。

sleeping.en: They grow so fast, wouldn't you say?

generic.en: It will turn traitor sometime later.
generic.trans: 过段时间它就会变成一个叛徒。

greenmooneye.en: This eye of green wishes to be seen!
greenmooneye.trans: 这只绿色的眼睛希望被看到！

krampus_sack.en: He should have known I would not hold back.
krampus_sack.trans: 他早该知道我不会手下留情的。

generic.en: Dazzling!

halloweencandy_9.en: Hyuyu, it slithers all the way down!

rock_avocado_fruit_ripe_cooked.en: A meal fit for a mortal.

robot_blueprint.en: This outfit might require a lot of ironing, hyuyu!
robot_blueprint.trans: 这件可能要好好熨熨，哼！

halloweencandy_7.en: Hm... I don't think I'll like that.

mask_dollhat.en: A mask to place upon my face.
mask_dollhat.trans: 脸上戴着面具，自有一番心绪。

koalefant_winter.en: How do you do? Why are you blue?

slurtleslime.en: A useful slime, I think, I say.

gingerbreadwarg.en: That cookie wants to sink its teeth into me!
gingerbreadwarg.trans: 那个饼干想拿牙齿咬我！

halloweencandy_1.en: Something to sink my fangs into!
halloweencandy_1.trans: 我要用獠牙好好咬住糖果！

recharging.en: These clocks, you will find, need some time to unwind.
recharging.trans: 你会发现，这些时钟需要一些时间来放松。

generic.en: Mortals keep coming up with such funny tricks!
generic.trans: 凡人总是能想出如此有趣的招数！

halloweencandy_2.en: I suppose I could eat a delightful treat.
halloweencandy_2.trans: 好吧，我也能美美吃一顿了。

generic.en: I do declare, there's nothing there.
generic.trans: 我郑重声明，那里什么也没有。

wx78module_music.en: Are you the brightest bulb of the bunch?
wx78module_music.trans: 你是夜空中最闪亮的灯泡么？

halloweencandy_4.en: I could be persuaded to try a taste.
halloweencandy_4.trans: 好吧，要是大家都劝我，那我就勉强尝一尝。

content.en: What a happy wyrm you are.

generic.en: You are blessed with eternal youth! Yes you are!

ceviche.en: I'd rather leave this for the humans.

salty_doghat.en: A hat needs fur, I do concur.

blueamulet.en: The cold won't get through my chest tuft, hyuyu.
blueamulet.trans: 冷风穿不过我的胸毛，哼。

bushhat.en: Now you see me, now you don't! Hyuyu!
bushhat.trans: 戴上这个你就看不见我了吧！哼！

cookiecutterhat.en: With this spiny gear, I've nothing to fear!

bananapop.en: Hyuyu, what will the mortals think of next?
bananapop.trans: 哼，凡人们还能做出来什么？

lightcrab.en: They're brighter than the monkeys at least.
lightcrab.trans: 它们至少比猴子更灵光。

deer_gemmed.en: That's a good look for you!

moon_fissure_plugged.en: Hyuyu! Can you not get out, little ones?
moon_fissure_plugged.trans: 哼！你们出不来了吗，小家伙们？

wurt_swampitem_shadow.en: Crafted by her scaly hand, to bring the swamp to any land.
wurt_swampitem_shadow.trans: 由她带鳞片的巧手打造，能变任何大地为泥沼。

upgraded_stacksize.en: There's room to spare for things in there.
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 腾出的空间足以收纳万千。

generic.en: A storage place for bits and bobs.

boat_ancient_container.en: To hide my prize from prying primate eyes.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 把我的战利品藏起，免得灵长类动物惦记。

grass_umbrella.en: A tool to keep the rain away.
grass_umbrella.trans: 可以让我不被雨淋的工具。

generic.en: What a funny thing!

critter_lunarmothling.en: On wings alight comes a fuzzy delight!

bonestew.en: Mortals like drinking goop like this.
bonestew.trans: 凡人们就喜欢喝这种粘稠的东西。

quagmire_pot_small.en: A little vessel for mortal food.

phonograph.trans: 哦，是音乐！整个人开心起来了！

halloween_ornament_1.en: It makes me hungry, yes indeed!

halloween_ornament_3.en: A creepy crawler for the tree.
halloween_ornament_3.trans: 古怪的动物，总爬在树上。

burnt.en: That prank went a bit too far.

generic.en: North, South, East, West, your sense of direction we'll put to the test!
generic.trans: 东西南北中，测测你对方向的精通！

halloween_ornament_5.en: Made to dangle from the tree.

lunarthrall_plant.en: A long way from home, aren't we?
lunarthrall_plant.trans: 远离家乡，咱俩不都是吗？

halloween_ornament_6.en: I do believe it is quite dead!

costume_princess_body.en: A princess must dress for success!
costume_princess_body.trans: 公主要赢人生，先赢穿搭！

generic.en: Let us celebrate!

empty.en: Rumble and grumble, it wants a bush!

nightmaregrowth.en: Methinks we'd best be on our way!
nightmaregrowth.trans: 我想我们最好还是上路吧！

cutreeds.en: One swift yank was all it took.

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.en: A bit of this, a bit of that, all to train my dear Carrat!
yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.trans: 这一点，那一点，把亲爱的胡萝卜鼠练的好一点！

rat.en: Your reflexes are quite good, for a vegetable.
rat.trans: 作为一个植物人，你反应已经很快了。

burnt.en: That prank went a bit too far.

generic.en: I just wanted to see how you'd react, hyuyu!
generic.trans: 我就想看看你会怎么反应，哼！

Buzz buzz buzz, tiny bee!

announce_winters_feast_buff_over.en: I'll never lose the impish sparkle in my eye.
announce_winters_feast_buff_over.trans: 我眼中恶魔的闪光是永远不会失去的。

announce_crafting_fail.trans: 我这手是真的被诅咒了。

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: Oh what a pain, I'm not safe from acid rain!

1.en: What a hoot, to play my flute!

2.en: A treat that feeds the soul! Hyuyu!
2.trans: 箫声不已，沁人心脾！哼哼！

deer.trans: 亲爱的，你看起来很好玩。

generic.en: Let's have some fun.

Weight: {weight}
I got my wish, a hefty fish!
announce_weight_heavy.trans:
重量: {weight}
如我所愿，大鱼为伴！

announce_unimplemented.en: What on earth could it be!

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: I knew I otter keep to the shallows, hyuyu!

announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.en: It's far too bright to sleep tonight.

announce_mount_lowhealth.en: Its soul hangs by a thread.

announce_hunt_beast_nearby.en: I love a game of hide and seek!

announce_highresearch.en: My brain's grown three sizes this day!
announce_highresearch.trans: 我的大脑今天膨胀了三倍！

announce_shadow_rift_max.trans: 称其为“光”并不完全正确。

describe_plantverystressed.trans: 很遗憾，这植物在闹意见。

announce_yotd_noboats.en: Me and the start are too far apart.

announce_nodaysleep.trans: 我不要打乱规律的作息时间。

announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.trans: 有点意思，我们找时间再来一次！

1.en: I feel the call to toot my flute! Hyuyu!
1.trans: 突然有了吹奏一曲的雅兴！哼！

2.en: My flute's my muse, I can't refuse!
2.trans: 排箫就是我难以拒绝的缪斯！

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.en: Back to the guessing game, hyuyu.

announce_scrapbook_full.en: I already know everything there is to know, hyuyu!

announce_weapon_tooweak.trans: 工欲善其事，必先利其器！

announce_klaus_enrage.en: Time to hop out of here!

announce_ocean_silhouette_incoming.trans: 哼，有东西要来一起玩了！

announce_ruins_reset.en: Oh good. The monsters have returned.

announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 噢，这下我有个有趣的想法了！

no_station.en: No, no, this just won't do.

no_ingredients.en: I seem to be missing a thing or two.

no_tech.trans: 它的构成对我来说是个谜。

describe_smoldering.en: Some fiery fun is about to begin!

2.en: The joke's on you! Hyuyu!

1.en: Oh my, I've taken so many!

1.en: My collection is running low.

2.en: I'll need a soul snack soon.

announce_attach_buff_attack.trans: 哼，我要跟你们好好玩玩！

announce_deerclops.en: A massive brute is en route!

announce_rabbitking_lucky.en: A special rabbit! Please don't stab it!
announce_rabbitking_lucky.trans: 一只特别的兔子！请不要去捅死！

announce_boat_sink.en: Into the drink I go, hyuyu!
announce_boat_sink.trans: 我这就进饮料里去了，哼！

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.en: He'll get us nowhere fast, hyuyu!

announce_wet.trans: 湿哒哒的将来会不会有霉味。

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 我要先腾出空间，才能把参赛选手添

announce_adventurefail.trans: 够了，不要再穿梭在不同的世界了。

announce_washed_ashore.en: I escaped the threat, but now I'm wet!

announce_rabbitking_passive.trans: 地下传来的是什么声音？

1.en: Hyuyuyu, time to go!

2.en: Oh my, something's stirring.
2.trans: 哎呀，神秘的能量在搅动。

3.trans: 呣，你听见什么声音了吗？

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: Oh, what fun, I'll help find one!
announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.trans: 这游戏太好玩，我来帮你找全！

announce_townportalteleport.en: Never fear, the imp is here!

invalid.en: Not even I could eat that.

yucky.en: I'd rather eat my own tail!

generic.en: Mmm! Soul free!

1.trans: 用光了灵魂的恶魔将要遭遇不幸！

2.trans: 我不想再吸取更多的灵魂了！

announce_carrat_start_race.en: Let the race begin, I'm sure to win!

announce_attach_buff_playerabsorption.en: I feel just great! Must've been something I ate!

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.en: Oh me, oh my, they passed me by!

1.en: I am absolutely famished!

2.en: I'm starved for some delicious souls!
2.trans: 饿坏我了，我要吃美味的灵魂！

3.en: I yearn for those tasty treats!
3.trans: 好想吃几口零食解馋啊！

1.en: The souls are going to burst my brim!

2.en: The burden of souls is certain to pop!

announce_carrat_error_walking.en: If you don't quicken your pace, we'll lose this race!
announce_carrat_error_walking.trans: 你要不加速，我们就要输！

announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.en: The light of day keeps the eye at bay!

announce_off_script.en: You slipped, that's not in the script! Hyuyuyu!
announce_off_script.trans: 你出戏了，没按剧本来！哼哼！

announce_nopumpkincarvingonfire.en: I weren't done, this burnt one!
announce_nopumpkincarvingonfire.trans: 我还没刻完，它已冒了烟！

1.en: I've enough souls to sustain me.
1.trans: 灵魂够多了，可以生存下去了。

2.en: I hope I was not too greedy.

announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 灵魂过度饥饿，难以小憩。

1.trans: 愉快的一天，我的好绿植！

2.en: I'm so sorry, I'm afraid I'm not quite fluent in plant.
2.trans: 很抱歉，我恐怕对植物语不太精通。

3.en: How dull to spend your life stuck in the ground! Luckily I'm here to make it more exciting!
3.trans: 一辈子困在地里多没劲啊! 幸好有我可以让你的生活更精彩!

4.en: You like hearing the sound of my voice almost as much as I do, hyuyu!
4.trans: 你和我一样喜欢听我的声音吧，哼!

5.en: Let's pull a prank! What do you think the mortals would do if you sprouted into a sheep?
5.trans: 我们来搞个恶作剧吧! 如果你发芽变成一只羊，你觉得凡人会是什么反应？

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.trans: 这个世界软绵绵的，破坏了我的大计。

announce_eating_not_feasting.en: I'm not going to eat it, might as well give it to the mortals.
announce_eating_not_feasting.trans: 我不会吃，不如给凡人们吃吧。

announce_enter_dark.en: I've been banished to the darkness plane!

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: Oh, is it me you're looking for?

announce_snowball_no_snow.trans: 没有更多雪，它难变大些。

idol_med.en: Time to come out and play, okay?

seed_med.en: Time to come out and play, okay?

glass_med.en: Time to come out and play, okay?

announce_nodangergift.trans: 礼物等会再说，现在是游戏时间！

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: I shouldn't have shattered the den, then?

announce_mosquitos.en: Mosquitos! Do I even have blood??

describe_plantstressormoisture.en: It needs a drink, I think.

announce_nodangersleep.en: Who could sleep when there's fun to be had?
announce_nodangersleep.trans: 都知道了有好玩的，谁还能睡得着？
